warnings.message: GCP BigQuery is stable-final for the documented batch BigQuery surface. Streaming, advanced write modes, non-Workflows deployment runners, native Dataplex lineage/aspects, raw Iceberg paths, JDBC/Delta Sharing and live governance-ledger reconciliation are explicitly outside this scoped claim.
